_meta.source: All values transcribed from baseline_1 (front + back).
_meta.note: Top-level keys are the COMPLETE set of mandatory label items for distilled spirits. verify() consumes brand_name, class_type, alcohol_content, net_contents, name_and_address, country_of_origin; the other items are part of the application for completeness (see _checklist for citation + which the verifier currently checks).

name_and_address: DISTILLED & BOTTLED BY: ABC Distillery, Frederick, MD
health_warning: GOVERNMENT WARNING: (1) According to the Surgeon General, women should not drink alcoholic beverages during pregnancy because of the risk of birth defects. (2) Consumption of alcoholic beverages impairs your ability to drive a car or operate machinery, and may cause health problems.

brand_name.verifier_checks: yes (fuzzy token_set_ratio vs the application brand/fanciful union)

class_type.applies: yes (a flavored spirit may be designated by a distinctive name + statement of composition)
class_type.verifier_checks: partial (fuzzy match; spelling and recognized-class-per-5.165 not checked)

statement_of_composition.applies: conditional - REQUIRED for Distilled Spirits Specialty products that use the distinctive/fanciful-name + statement-of-composition designation path (incl. flavored); applies here ('Rum with natural flavors added')
statement_of_composition.verifier_checks: no (now a DEDICATED evidence-only extraction field 'statement_of_composition'; NOT consumed by verify() -> reviewer-only / not verifier-judged)

alcohol_content.verifier_checks: yes (numeric match + NOTATION format now checked: bare 'ABV' is rejected, 27 CFR 5.65)

proof.verifier_checks: yes (now validated: proof must equal 2x ABV; 50 proof on 20% ABV -> FAIL; config.PROOF_ABV_TOLERANCE)

net_contents.verifier_checks: partial (unit-aware VOLUME compare: same volume in a different unit/format -> needs_review; standard-of-fill table 5.203 still NOT enforced)

name_and_address.verifier_checks: partial (punctuation/relationship-prefix-normalized fuzzy + short-subset coverage guard; producer-name SUBSTITUTION is a KNOWN GAP/xfail; 'Bottled By' prefix and no-intervening-text not checked)

health_warning.verifier_checks: yes (exact wording + ALL-CAPS + S/G capitalization are deterministic; BOLD is confidence-gated (WARNING_BOLD_POLICY, default medium_pass_gate) and run-to-run UNSTABLE; checked from the LABEL, not this form value)

_layout_typography_structural.same_field_of_vision: 27 CFR 5.63 - brand name + alcohol content + class/type must appear in one field of vision; NOT verifiable from flat per-field text -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.designation_separate_and_apart: 27 CFR 5.165 / 5.141 - class/type must be separate and apart from other info -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_separate_and_apart_single: 27 CFR part 16 - one statement, separate and apart -> structural / out-of-scope
_layout_typography_structural.health_warning_bold_typography: 27 CFR part 16 - 'GOVERNMENT WARNING' in CAPS + BOLD; caps + S/G are judged deterministically, BOLD is confidence-gated and machine-unreliable -> reviewer-leaning

_not_applicable.formula_number: UNMODELED - flavored spirit likely requires an approved formula (27 CFR 5.141); application-side data not modeled by the verifier
